---
name: Text typos and improvements
about: Report issues involving prose and UI text elements
title: ''
labels: bug, prose
assignees: ''
type: Bug

---

Before reporting prose corrections, make sure you consider <https://wiki.wesnoth.org/NotSpellingMistakes>.

In order to speed up work, also try to report as many closely-related typos as possible in a single report — e.g. don't file 10 reports in a row to report individual typos that you noticed at the same time in the same scenario/dialogue sequence.

Issues with translations (including updated translations) should not be reported to this tracker, but rather to [Ethea-i18n](https://github.com/project-ethea/Ethea-i18n).

**Source**
Specify the location/situation where you spotted the faulty text, including campaign and scenario number if applicable.

**Original text**
Quote the text verbatim. You can use `**bold**` to highlight the issue.

**Proposed changes**
